requirement_topic.en: TRA Oman Mandatory Radio Type Approval (TRA Mark)
requirement_topic.zh: 阿曼TRA强制无线电型号认证（TRA标志）
requirement_topic.zht: 阿曼TRA強制無線電型號認證（TRA標誌）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain TRA Oman mandatory type approval under the Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Oman before import or sale in Oman. The TRA mark and TRA approval number must appear on the device and its packaging label. Approval requires test reports from an accredited laboratory to ETSI or IEC/ITU standards accepted by TRA Oman, aligned with the Oman National Frequency Spectrum Plan. CCC, CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, and SRRC certificates are not recognised by TRA Oman. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (GCC MRA) provides recognition only among GCC member states; it does not extend to Chinese, EU, or US approvals.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须取得阿曼电信监管局（TRA Oman）强制型号认证，方可进口或在阿曼销售。设备及包装标签须标注TRA标志和TRA审批号。认证需提交获TRA Oman认可的实验室依据ETSI或IEC/ITU标准出具的测试报告，并符合阿曼国家频率频谱计划。CCC、CE符合性声明、FCC ID及SRRC证书不被TRA Oman承认。GCC相互承认协议（GCC MRA）仅在GCC成员国内有效，不延伸至中国、欧盟或美国的批准。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須取得阿曼電信監管局（TRA Oman）強制型號認證，方可進口或在阿曼銷售。裝置及包裝標籤須標注TRA標誌和TRA審批號。認證需提交獲TRA Oman認可的實驗室依據ETSI或IEC/ITU標準出具的測試報告，並符合阿曼國家頻率頻譜計畫。CCC、CE符合性聲明、FCC ID及SRRC證書不被TRA Oman承認。GCC相互承認協議（GCC MRA）僅在GCC成員國內有效，不延伸至中國、歐盟或美國的批准。

standards_or_laws: Oman Telecommunications Regulatory Act (Royal Decree 30/2002 and amendments)
TRA Oman Type Approval Procedures and Requirements
Oman National Frequency Spectrum Plan (TRA Oman)

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment connecting to public telecom networks additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue. 5 GHz DFS (Dynamic Frequency Selection) channel availability follows Chinese regulatory allocation, which differs from Oman's GCC-aligned spectrum plan.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。连接公共电信网络的电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。5 GHz DFS（动态频率选择）信道可用性遵循中国监管划分，与阿曼GCC协调频谱计划不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。連接公共電信網路的電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。5 GHz DFS（動態頻率選擇）信道可用性遵循中國監管劃分，與阿曼GCC協調頻譜計畫不同。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access
MIIT Order No. 52 (5 GHz WLAN frequency allocation)

gap.en: TRA Oman type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by TRA Oman. The GCC MRA covers mutual recognition only among Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, and Oman — it does not extend to Chinese approvals. A fresh TRA Oman application with accredited-lab test reports, TRA mark, and TRA approval number on device and packaging label is required for every model sold or imported into Oman. 5 GHz DFS channel requirements follow Oman's GCC-aligned national spectrum plan and may differ from the Chinese SRRC allocation.
gap.zh: TRA Oman型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。TRA Oman不承认SRRC批准或CCC认证。GCC MRA仅覆盖沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋、科威特、卡塔尔、巴林和阿曼之间的相互承认，不延伸至中国批准。每款在阿曼销售或进口的产品均须重新提交TRA Oman申请，附经认可实验室出具的测试报告，并在设备和包装标签上标注TRA标志和TRA审批号。5 GHz DFS信道要求遵循阿曼GCC协调国家频谱计划，可能与中国SRRC划分有所不同。
gap.zht: TRA Oman型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。TRA Oman不承認SRRC批准或CCC認證。GCC MRA僅涵蓋沙烏地阿拉伯、阿聯酋、科威特、卡達、巴林和阿曼之間的相互承認，不延伸至中國批准。每款在阿曼銷售或進口的產品均須重新提交TRA Oman申請，附經認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並在裝置和包裝標籤上標注TRA標誌和TRA審批號。5 GHz DFS信道要求遵循阿曼GCC協調國家頻譜計畫，可能與中國SRRC劃分有所不同。

source.publisher: TRA Oman — Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Oman (هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TRA Oman type approval and the TRA mark are mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Oman. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. The GCC MRA does not extend recognition to Chinese approvals. 5 GHz DFS requirements must be verified against Oman's national spectrum plan.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TRA Oman型号认证和TRA标志对所有在阿曼进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。GCC MRA不延伸承认中国批准。5 GHz DFS要求须依据阿曼国家频谱计划进行核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TRA Oman型號認證和TRA標誌對所有在阿曼進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。GCC MRA不延伸承認中國批准。5 GHz DFS要求須依據阿曼國家頻譜計畫進行核驗。
